## NotebookLmDriver.generateAudioOverview() method

Opens "Customize Audio Overview", sets format/length/prompt, and clicks Generate. Returns immediately after clicking Generate; the audio renders asynchronously (minutes) — callers do not await completion.

**Signature:**

```typescript
generateAudioOverview(nb: Notebook, opts: AudioOverviewOptions): Promise<void>;
```
